data.raceComments: {"comment":"16. DOYLE was only doing his best work late at Ipswich last start and did make some inroads. Kept fresh with 44 days in between and will find this easier. 5. PRINCE RUPERT went better than the formguide reads second-up at Port Mac, warming up sharply late only to be beaten 2L after turning over 7L off the leader. Strips fitter third-up and is drawn kinder. Can play a major role this time. 2. SMACKEROONY was a long way off his best last time at Dalby but his prior form reads well for this. He boasts a strong record over this trip and deserves another chance. 3. IT'SALLSAIDANDONE didn't handle the tough conditions at Coffs Harbour last start after filling a minor placing in two races on end, the latest here over 1420m. Drawn sticky but shouldn't be forgotten.","runners":[16,5,2,3],"exclusive":false}
